'''BAS Research & Development''' was a division of the [[Bank of Aargau Security, Ltd.]], itself a subsidiary of the [[Bank of Aargau/Legends|Bank of Aargau]]. It developed various scanning and security technologies for the Bank of Aargau Security, including the [[BAS44 Customs-Grade Holoscanner]].

{{Company-stub}}
